holdings.infoBox: AVSE is an equity ETF with a total of 2399 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 8.37%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 8.33%, Samsung Electronics Co Ltd DR at 6.46%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 2.22%, and MediaTek at 1.95%.

overview.description: The Avantis Responsible Emerging Markets Equity ETF (AVSE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in companies of all market capitalizations in emerging markets. Holdings are screened for multiple ESG metrics and fundamental criteria AVSE was launched on Mar 28, 2022 and is issued by American Century Investments.
